149: def _is_dangerous_protect(code):
150: if not code: return (False, "")
151: for pat, why in _DANGEROUS_PATTERNS_PROTECT:
152: if pat.search(code):
153: return (True, why)
154: return (False, "")

156: _PW_CACHE_PROTECT = {"loaded_at": 0, "values": []}
157:     58	
158: def _redact_passwords_protect(text):
159: if not text: return text
160: now = _time_protect.time()
161: if now - _PW_CACHE_PROTECT["loaded_at"] > 600:
162: vals = []
163: for vn in ("SDN-SharedVault", "SDN-YooVault", "SDN-HeatherVault", "SDN-KayeVault"):
164: try:
165: names = _sp_protect.check_output(
166: ["az","keyvault","secret","list","--vault-name",vn,"--query","[?ends_with(name,'password')].name","-o","tsv"],
167: timeout=12, text=True,
168: ).splitlines()
169: except Exception:
170: continue
171: for n in names:
172: try:
173: v = _sp_protect.check_output(
174: ["az","keyvault","secret","show","--vault-name",vn,"--name",n,"--query","value","-o","tsv"],
175: timeout=8, text=True,
176: ).strip()
177: if v and len(v) >= 4:
178: vals.append(v)
179: except Exception: pass
180: _PW_CACHE_PROTECT["values"] = list(set(vals))
181: _PW_CACHE_PROTECT["loaded_at"] = now
182: for v in _PW_CACHE_PROTECT["values"]:
183: if v in text:
184: text = text.replace(v, "[REDACTED-PASSWORD]")
185: return text
